next_action: Do not train the proposed cohort ranker; revise teacher allocation or observable representation.

method.caveat: The R1200 cohort oracle is an information upper bound, not a deployable player or score claim. Confidence sets use the same normal independence approximation as ADR 0086.
method.cohort_oracle: R1200-labeled actions by descending R1200 mean and action hash, then unlabeled actions by descending screen value and action hash
